raw_text: So far very good experience with Blinkit. I would rate it on top of all the other apps in the market, the only thing required is good discounts offers & coupons in comparison with other service providers in the market.

While the service quality is commendable, I have recently opted against utilizing Blinkit due to their pricing structure. The platform levies various surcharges, such as "handling charges" and "high-demand charges," which ultimately result in a higher cost per product compared to alternative platforms.

Zero accountability. My previous orders were delivered to some other places. Today, a part of a packed item is missing. Delivery executive cannot be contacted because he left his phone with his family!!! Blinkit doesn't take any responsibility for late deliveries and missing items. I am done with this app. No more orders.

These guys confused between 3 locations in my city and neither was i given proper support from customer care after tiring attempts nor full refund (cancellation charge applied for their fault) for one of my two orders. The order has given me no response.

Very fast delivery in many cities, often within minutes. Great for groceries, snacks, stationery, and last-minute needs. Easy-to-use app and frequent discounts. Many users praise quick replacements and smooth issue resolution.

Don't trust Blinkit. They fail to deliver orders on time, and getting a refund becomes another frustrating battle. Taking customers' money is easy for them, but providing proper service or prompt refunds clearly isn't. Extremely disappointing and unacceptable!
tbh, this app is just hella good, I can't describe in words like, rapid delivery, good quality items or whatever you order, plus a real quick game puzzle activity bag, I just love it.

They have this useless delivery options on their app. even if we select leave at the door, the delivery person rings the bell and even make numerous calls. their customer care executive said it won't happen again, but still the delivery guys never follow our options asked in the app. A useless app.

Few items are regularly unavailable especially Spring onions. Choice of vegetables can be increased. Appreciate the delivery time. Please chk the date of expiry before delivery. Have had bad experiences of receiving items with date of expiry very near.

Worst delivery platform. They charged my delivery fee twice and platform fee also despite several complains no refund was made. Wasted a lot of my time as well. There are so many good alternatives available.

Too expensive, step out and buy product from near by Local Market. No customer service and resolution provided on time. Fast service needs fast resolution. today's experience: डिलेवरी boy name is incorrectly mention in the application, we are not aware who is going to deliver your items, Name is showing Md. only. weather these peoples are fully complaint and who is checking their compliance. application can't make these fake people compliant.

Poor experience with Blinkit. The free gift shown in my order was not delivered, and customer support said the item was not available in the store. If it's unavailable, it should not be added to orders. Also, the Amul Butter packaging looked unusual, raising quality concerns. Please improve quality checks and order accuracy.

I think it is the best app for grocery shopping especially at the time of emergency if anything was not there in the house . It is a very convenient app for everyday essentials and basic necessities. I just loved this app .

disgusting! i have ordered something but that is not same as I want.. I didn't even use that I am just asking to replace it like to return that... it hasn't been even 24 hrs and they are denying taking the product then why to write in their app that you can return the items and all? if you don't want to take it?

I have a bad experience. The order have been taken from the store and after online payment process complete, Refused to deliver the order and no money refundable option is there. Blinkit cheat the customer cancel the order itself and took the cancellation charges

It takes more than 45 minutes for order and then the support team says it got delayed because of the technical issue and will not be able to deliver the order. Please cancel it. very frustrating experience

extra charges, surge charges, high price. They sent wrong item and that was cheaper. When I asked for refund, they said no policy of refunding money. After an exchange of 8 Emails regarding the same matter, finally the executive called me, said the same thing and disconnected the phone while I was speaking. Pathetic experience both with the products and with customer care. Zepto is far far better. Product was not available on Zepto at that time, so I thought of ordering from Blinkit, bad experie

During the adding of items to the cart I got an item (Dog's toy) as a free gift. But I haven't received that item. I didn't get help from your customer support either. Your delivery partner was prompt and well behaved

Blinkit can add items on its own !!! I was trying to buy groceries with total bill of Rs.230, but upon payment it was asking for Rs.600 plus. I tried to go back to check, but the app did not allow to leave the payment page. I had to force stop the app to check the cart, to find that a box of Taj tea had been added automatically. Wow. blinkit has become smartest. Are you using Ai ??

it's an amazing app but some time some delivered partners make inconvenience like 2 times it happened with me that order not delivered from last 1 hour and afterwards it shows that it is delivered but in real it hasn't came but the service is nice by blinkit I got refund but my time wasted..... and every time I place an order and aad some coupons it never deduct the price of coupon but it shows that it is applied..... these proble I have got in past 2 years by ordering from blinkit...
